name: Shrimp Divan
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Celery Soup (10.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange broccoli in a greased 7x11-inch baking dish; cover with shrimp and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and herbs.
2. Combine soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and cheese and pour over shrimp.
3. Top with buttered crumbs; bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 40 minutes.
NOTE: Crumbs may be fine dry bread, fine fresh bread, cornflake crumbs, or packaged stuffing; mix with about 3 tablespoons melted butter.
